ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using forward-links. If you have a graph like this: A -> B -> C and you ask about the story between A and C, it will give you 'A, B, C' since A forward-links to B and B forward-links to C
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用前向链接进行遍历。如果你有这样一个图：A -> B -> C，并且你询问 A 和 C 之间的故事，它会给出“ A, B, C ”，因为 A 前向链接到 B，B 前向链接到 C

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using back-links. If you have a graph like this: A -> B -> C and you ask about the story between C and A, it will give you 'C, B, A' since C has a back-link from B and B has a back-link from A
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用反向链接进行遍历。如果你有这样一个图：A -> B -> C，并且你询问 C 和 A 之间的故事，它会给出“ C, B, A ”，因为 C 有来自 B 的反向链接，B 有来自 A 的反向链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using tags.
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用标签进行遍历。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will skip 'hub' notes with too many links (MOCs). Configure exactly how many links make a MOC below.
ast.target: 如果设置，将跳过链接过多的“枢纽”笔记（MOC）。在下方配置多少个链接会被视为 MOC。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure at which point to skip a note because it contains too many out-bound links. Applies only if 'Take the scenic route' above is set.
ast.target: 配置在何种情况下因包含过多外向链接而跳过笔记。仅在上方设置了“Take the scenic route”时适用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will note include notes from the specified folders in your search. Please use comma to deliminate several folders
ast.target: 如果设置，将不在搜索中包含指定文件夹中的笔记。请用逗号分隔多个文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will turn titles in the list into links to their respective note
ast.target: 如果设置，会将列表中的标题转换为指向相应笔记的链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will automatically create transcluding links for you ('![[note]]' instead of '- [[note]]')
ast.target: 如果设置，将自动为你创建内嵌链接（用“![[note]]”代替“- [[note]]”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will increase the contrast to make the result-list easier to read.
ast.target: 如果设置，将提高对比度，使结果列表更易阅读。

ast.target: 以下是一些可能的原因：

ast.target: 你当前在设置中已禁用正向链接

ast.target: 这两条笔记可能不在同一网络中。
